The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] '''raided''' on [[Yuuzhan Vong]]–occupied [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. The goal was to train new recruits in combat that the New Republic was sure to win, in preparation for a [[Battle of Ebaq|decisive major battle]] later on.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1stm}}
